column1: # Title: Regional labor-capital cost share adjustments for GTAP data
# Description: Calibration adjustments to labor and capital cost shares by region and commodity type.
# These adjustments replicate the hard-coded logic from commit 6957303b3.
# Logic per row: (1) cl_total = CL_Total_Share * total_multiplier; (2) if condition met:
#   Labor_Ag = cl_total * labor_share (if not NA); Capital_Ag = cl_total * capital_share (if not NA)
#   capital_direct_multiplier applied to original Capital_Ag before shares (only when capital_share is NA)

column8: Labor = 45% of CL when capital < labor
Capital = 55% of CL when capital > labor
20/80 split for crops when cap > labor
